name: Sons Of Samoa
description: Sons of Samoa (SOS) is a Crips-affiliated street gang based in west Long Beach, California, predominantly Samoan American. By 1985 had about 200 members. Active in Alaska, California, Missouri, Utah, and Washington per a 2011 FBI report. In the 1980s heavily involved in cocaine and PCP sales, robbery, burglary, and extortion. Uses the Seattle Mariners 'S' logo. The Suicidals are a subset.
